Is it safe to dismantle all covenants with low completion? Or do I have to manually look through them to dismantle

If you already levelled it you can reroll them for 3 stamps, which will give them substats like any other covenant has. If they're level 0 just get new ones, either way you'll wind up farming more covenant pieces eventually so it doesn't matter too much
I don’t know if substats apply retroactively tbh
are you talking about the transcribing thing?
Completion doesn't really matter as much as the actual stats do. If you have a piece with like 2 8s in Aelimus regen it'll have high completion, but chances are you're not gonna want to use it
For substats, yea iirc
no
u can add
later
when u get 55
O then how do people decide which to dismantle
Besides looking at all of them individually
I already have the transcribe thing at 45
Or lock those that are important and dismantle everything else

You dismantle anything you don't want to use, which is most of them. If any of them have a very high single substat that matches what you want while being on a mainstat you want, then you keep it and lock the sub to reroll
If you're not locking it then your rerolls are completely random so the subs that are on them don't matter
You make presets of which pieces you wanna use, and dismantle what’s not in the presets <:Doll_wait:1468259092459032606>

Aequor red stance makes it so that each hit that you do, a tentacle will slap.

Aurita rouse makes it so that whenever Aurita attacks, a tentacle will also attack. because of this, each attack that Aurita makes, a tentacle will slap 2 times.

Aurita exalt has one hit, and it can hit 10 more times based on the number of gland division cards the exalt consumes from both draw and discard pile.

Guys new here and got one question, when teaming up Ghelot + Horla what is the purpose of Horla?
got Horla at E1+ or only E0?
E0
then she is mostly used for her passive buff when triggering leap on her card.
for example, using her 0 cost card and triggering a leap with it will change the passive buff to increased aliemus gain for the whole team
and then leap-ing her "strike" (snarl palm) on your burst turn will increase your damage.
So you use here 0 cost card to increase the aliemus gain for whole team. Then you use here Snarl palm to increase damage and then you go all in with Ghelot cards
yes
exactly

snarl psalm and ultra round
helot is for exalt, same as in mouch team
G.Helot's 4 cost card (Bloodthirsty flail) counts as a Strike. Helot's exalt gives 80% damage increase to all strike cards
So use Helot's exalt on the turn you want to use the 4-costs ones
